enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about returning to cycling after completing the Old Testament section of his website, describing his first 4-hour-20-minute roller ride in months, his current low fitness level and power output (~160W), and his plans to prioritize riding going forward. He also covers streaming/OBS technical issues, his website project involving Theodor Mommsen's History of Rome, and touches on his complicated relationship with his mother.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: believes it is the best Bible resource in the world and sees finishing it as a major milestone
considers it his favorite book, like an encyclopedia of Ancient Rome
now fully committed to cycling first, then running, then swimming — treats riding with the same obsessive focus he previously gave his website
paranoid she will discourage him and prefers to avoid talking to her while pursuing his goals
openly acknowledges he is out of shape, riding at roughly 1.76–1.82 W/kg, and attributes it partly to excess weight (~190–200 lbs)
